chinese_text: 天命玄鳥，降而生商，宅殷土芒芒。古帝命武湯，正域彼四方。
translation_text:
Heaven commissioned the swallow,
To descend and give birth to (the father of our) Shang.
(His descendants) dwelt in the land of Yin, and became great.
(Then) long ago God appointed the martial Thang,
To regulate the boundaries throughout the four quarters (of the kingdom).

chinese_text: 方命厥后，奄有九有。商之先后，受命不殆，在武丁孫子。
translation_text:
(In those) quarters he appointed the princes,
And grandly possessed the nine regions.
The ​first sovereign of Shang
Received the appointment without any element of instability in it,
And it is (now) held by the descendant of Wû-ting.

chinese_text: 武丁孫子，武王靡不勝。龍旂十乘，大糦是承。
translation_text:
The descendant of Wû-ting
Is a martial sovereign, equal to every emergency.
Ten princes, (who came) with their dragon-emblazoned banners,
Bear the large dishes of millet.

chinese_text: 邦畿千里，維民所止，肇域彼四海。四海來假，來假祁祁。
景員維河，殷受命咸宜，百祿是何。
translation_text:
From the four seas they come (to our sacrifices);
They come in multitudes.
King has the Ho for its outer border.
That Yin should have received the appointment (of Heaven) was entirely right;—
(Its sovereign) sustains all its dignities.
